reproduction_fields: Driver, CUDA, operating system and runtime versions
Immutable source revision and artifact SHA-256
Raw correctness, latency, throughput and VRAM artifacts
Known deviations, failures and incomplete scenarios

contribution_paths.name: Reproduce
contribution_paths.description: Run an existing claim on new hardware and publish auditable artifacts.

contribution_paths.name: Integrate
contribution_paths.description: Add a runtime adapter with scenario hooks, correctness references and a qualification plan.

contribution_paths.name: Challenge
contribution_paths.description: Report negative or conflicting results without removing earlier evidence.

contribution_paths.name: Explain
contribution_paths.description: Improve technical communication while preserving evidence boundaries.
